shayari:
Thoda Bahut To Humne Bhi Kama Rakha Hai,

Ek Kohinoor Si Ladki Ko
Apna Dost Bana Rakha Hai.

Karoge yaad
Guzre zamaane ko..!

Tarsoge humare sath
Ek pal bitane ko..!

Phir aawaz doge humein
Vaapas bulane ko..!

Aur ham kahenge,
Darwaza nahi hai
Qabar se bahaar aane ko..!!

Sone lage hum fir se samay par,
Fir kabhi lambi raat na hui.

Fir jo maine shuru na ki,
Fir kabhi humari baat na hui.

Wo safar mein thi,
Ruka hua tha main.

Wo zamane se aage thi,
Aur atka hua tha main.

Wo naye iradon mein thi,
Aur purane khayalon mein tha main.

Usne phir kabhi piche mud ke dekha hi nahi,
Aur thik piche hi khada tha main..!!

Kabhi lafz bhul jau,
Kabhi baat bhul jau.

Tujhe uss kadar chahu,
Ki apni zaat bhul jau.

Kaise kahe tumhe
Ke kitna chaha hai tumhe,

Agar kehne pe aau
Toh alfaaz bhul jau.

Chehre se mohabbat hoti
To aaj har aaina wafadaar hota,

Har khoobsurat shakhs
Kisi na kisi ka yaar hota.

Mohabbat to rooh se ki jaati hai janaab,

Warna husn dekh kar
To har koi beqaraar hota.

Nazar Lag Jaati Hain,
Jataya Na Kar.

Ishq Ek Raaz Hai,
Bataya Na Kar.

Lakh Samjhaya,
Shak Karta Hai Zamana.

Jab Tu Paas Se Guzre Toh
Muskuraya Na Kar.

Hum yaad rahe to theek,
Warna bhula dena.

Kuch galti ho jaye toh
Khushi se saza dena.

Hum to ek kore kagaj ki tarah hai,

Kuch likh do to thik,
Warna jalaa dena.

कल उसकी याद पूरी रात आती रही,

मैं जागता रहा,
पूरी दुनिया सोती रही।

आसमान पर पूरी रात
बिजली कड़कती रही,

बस एक बारिश ही थी
जो मेरे साथ रोती रही।

Wo raat,
Wo baat,
Wo mulakat,
Wo hasi,
Wo khushi,
Wo yaade,
Wo wade,
Wo bita hua kal,
Wo guzra hua pal,
Wo tere sath,
Wo mere hathon me Tera hath,
Wo sab ek kahani thi Jo adhuri reh gayi.

Tu milkar bhi na mil saka,
Aur mai bhool kar bhi na bhool saka.
Wo teri ek nishani reh gayi.

Jante Ho Fir Bhi Aanjaan Bante Ho.

Is Tarah Kyo Hume Pareshan Karte Ho.

Puchte Ho Mujhe Kya Pasand Hai,

Jawab Khud Ho Fir Bhi Sawal Karte Ho.

Unhone Jate Jate Bade Guroor Se Kaha,

Tum Jaise Toh Bahot Milenge.

Humne Bhi Muskura Ke Puch Liya,

Humare Jaisa Hi Kyu Chahiye?

Mat kar waada Aakhri pal tak saath chalne ka.

Hamari riti-riwajo me Aurten qabristan tak Nahi jaya karti.

कि किस्मत के खेल से कभी मायूस नहीं होते,

मेरे दोस्त ज़िंदगी में ऐसे कभी उदास नहीं होते।

और हाथों की लकीरों पर कभी भरोसा मत करना,

तकदीर तो उनकी भी होती है जिनके हाथ नहीं होते।

Zindagi se thodi wafa kijiye,

Jo nahi mila Use dafa kijiye.

Har koi nahi hota Aapke qabil,

Akele baith ke Chai ka maza lijiye.

Kuch sahi toh Kuch kharab kehte hai.

Log hume Bigda hua Nawab kehte hai.

Hum toh badnaam hue Kuch is kadar,

Pani bhi piya toh Log Sharab kehte hai.

Chup Rahoge Toh Baat Kaun Karega.

Ham Nahi Rahe To Yaad Kaun Karega.

Mana Ki Ham Itne Ache Nahi Hai,

Par Ham Na Rahe To Pareshan Kaun Karega.

Padhne wala bhi Tera deedar karega.

Ek baar nahi Sau baar padhega.

Main likhunga Jab shayari tujhpe,

Meri diary ka Ek ek panna bhi Tujhse pyaar karega.

Gulab jaise ho,

Gulab lagte ho,

Halka sa muskura do to

Lajawab lagte ho.

Ae hawa, Tu bhi to wahan jaati hogi,

Mera haal Unko batati hogi.

Zara chhoo kar dekh Unke dil ko,

Kya unko bhi Meri yaad aati hogi.

Kalam thodi kamzor hai hamari,
Taarifein tumhari ek saath nahi likh paayegi.

Apni aankhon se kaho zara kam itraae,
Inhe pata hai shuruaat inhi se ki jayegi.

I was the candle,
She was the night...

I burned for her,
She waited for the sun.

Main tod leta agar tu gulaab hoti,
Main jawab banta agar tu sawal hoti.

Sab jaante hain main nasha nahi karta,
Magar main pee bhi leta agar tu sharab hoti.

तेरी आँखों के सामने ये शहर कौन देखेगा,

तू दरिया सी है ये लहर कौन देखेगा..!!

तू खूबसूरत से भी ज़्यादा खूबसूरत है,

तुझे देखने के बाद ताज-महल कौन देखेगा..!!

Raat toh paband hai,
Waqt par laut aati hai har roz.

Kambakht neend hi Aawara ho gayi hai aaj kal.

Mohabbat na hoti toh Gazal kaun likhta,

Keechad ke phool ko Kamal kaun kehta.

Pyaar toh kudrat ka karishma hai warna.

Lash ke ghar ko Taj Mahal kaun kehta.

Na puch mujhse mere jagne ki wajah aye chand...

Koi tera hi hamshakal hai jo aksar mujhe sone nahi deta...!!

Chiraagon mein itna noor na hota...
To tanha dil majboor na hota.

Hum aapse milne zarur aate,

Agar aapka ghar itna door na hota...

Suna hai aaj kal tum muskurati bahut ho,

Dil karta hai le jaun tumhe dinner pe,

Par suna hai tum khati bahut ho.

Nind nahi aati mujhe raaton mein,

Zikr hota hai tumhara meri har baaton mein.

Tumhe gair se baat karta dekh,

Main ye sochta hoon,

Kaunsi lakeer nahi hai mere haathon mein..!!

Dhoop nikle aur barsaat na rahe,

Shayad kal ko mere aise haalaat na rahe,

Aur abhi sasta hoon to khareed lo mujhko,

Kya pata kal tumhari aukaat na rahe.

Keemat paani ki nahi pyaas ki hoti hai,

Kadar maut ki nahi saans ki hoti hai.

Pyaar to bahut log karte hain is duniya mein,

Keemat pyaar ki nahi, vishwas ki hoti hai.

Bahut gehri thi raat lekin hum soye nahi,

Dard bhi bahut tha dil mein,

Magar hum roye nahi,

Koi nahi hamara jo puche humse bhi,

Jaag rahe ho kis ke liye,

Aur kis ke liye soye nahi...

Mere dil par zakhm uske ishq ki meherbani hai,

Meri mohabbat ek adhoori kahani hai.

Sochte hain khatam kar dein is dard ko,

Magar ye dard hi to uski aakhri nishani hai.

Wo ishq hi kya jo kisi ke chehre se ho...

Maza to tab aata hai jab ishq kisi ki baaton se ho...!!

Shaadi bhi kar liye aur sukoon bhi chahte ho...

Bade nadaan ho Ghalib,

Zehar bhi pee liye aur jeena bhi chahte ho...!!

Agar kabhi meri yaadon se teri azaadi ho jaye,

Agar kisi aur ke saath teri shaadi ho jaye!!

To ho sake to mere ishq ka mujhe daam dena,

Apne bete ko mera hi naam dena!!

Kisi ne phool se poocha,

Jab tumhe toda gaya, tumhe dard hua?

Phool ne khoobsurat jawab diya,

Todne wala itna khush tha ki main dard bhool gaya.

Mere saath kuch aisa hone wala hai,

Ghar ka ek moti khone wala hai!!

Aao yaar seene se laga lo,

Ab ye chehra hamesha ke liye sone wala hai!!

Wo jaate jaate keh gaye,

Hum sirf khwaab mein aayenge.

Humne kaha,

Wada to karo,

Hum zindagi bhar so jayenge.

Mohabbat karo to dhokha na dena,

Pyaar ko aansuon ka tohfa na dena,

Dil se roye koi aapki yaad mein,

Aisa kisi ko kabhi mauka na dena.

Gam mein hasne walon ko rulaya nahi jaata,

Lehron ko paani se milaya nahi jaata!!

Hone wale khud hi apne ho jaate hain,

Kisi ko keh kar apna banaya nahi jaata!!

Ek raat ek baat likhunga,

Khud ko daag, tujhe saaf likhunga.

Haqeeqat mein tu kabhi milega nahi,

Ek kitaab mein apni mulaqat likhunga...!!
